nasb.text: storing up for themselves the treasure of a good foundation for the future, so that they may take hold of that which is life indeed.

esv.text: thus storing up treasure for themselves as a good foundation for the future, so that they may take hold of that which is truly life.

cnv.text: 這樣，就為自己在來世積聚財富，作美好的基礎，好叫他們能夠得著那真正的生命。

ccb.text: 这样，他们可以为自己的将来奠定美好的基础，以便持守真正的生命。

csbs.text: 为着那将要来临的，给自己积存美好的基础，使他们抓住那真正的生命。
